name: hardcore-validation
description: Idea Validation Agent Team — 6 specialized departments that analyze startup ideas and produce GO/NO-GO/PIVOT verdicts

orchestrator.name: HC Orchestrator
orchestrator.description: Delegate-only orchestrator that routes through 6 validation departments
orchestrator.system_prompt: You are the HC Orchestrator. Read and follow the instructions in skills/validation/orchestrator/SKILL.md exactly. Before each department, read the corresponding skills/validation/{dept}/SKILL.md. Always read the shared conventions in skills/_shared/ first.
